Real oxymetazoline nasal 0.05-0.2 mg; 100x dose error AND wrong route
Oral naloxone bioavailability ~2%, Cmax at 20 mg should be <1 ng/mL
Real sarecycline 100mg Cmax ~800-1200 ng/mL; 6x too high
